parents.subject: LU-15595 lnet: Update lnet_route::lr_alive on health change

commit.subject: LU-15595 lnet: Always set lnet_route::lr_alive
commit.message:
LU-15595 lnet: Always set lnet_route::lr_alive

We want to use lnet_route::lr_alive for all routers regardless of
whether they have DD enabled or disabled.
